name: Dieter Ilg
abstract: Dieter Josef Ilg (born September 30, 1961, in Offenburg) is a German jazz double-bassist. He worked early in his career with Joe Viera in the early 1980s, then with Randy Brecker, the WDR Big Band, Bennie Wallace, Albert Mangelsdorff, Wolfgang Dauner, Charlie Mariano, Marc Copland, Jeff Hirshfield, Wolfgang Muthspiel and others.

concerts.label: Thomas Quasthoff, Bass-Baritone: An American Songbook
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ... Here’s an interesting record with Rolf Kuhn, Chuck Loeb, Dieter Ilg, and Wolfgang Haffner. [INTERVIEWEE] That’s Rolf Kuhn’s record.
